mapper.sql: select a.alarm_id, a.alarm_name, a.alarm_code, a.alarm_type, a.ip_addr, a.install_position, a.chute_id, c.chute_name, a.dept_id, d.dept_name, a.status, a.del_flag, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.remark from device_alarm a left join device_chute c on c.chute_id = a.chute_id left join sys_dept d on d.dept_id = a.dept_id
mapper.insert: insert into device_alarm(alarm_name, alarm_code, alarm_type, ip_addr, install_position, chute_id, dept_id, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{alarmName}, #{alarmCode}, #{alarmType}, #{ipAddr}, #{installPosition}, #{chuteId}, #{deptId}, #{status}, '0', #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.update:
update device_alarm set del_flag = '2' where alarm_id in
#{alarmId}
